name: New Ruling Request

---

## Item requiring a ruling

What cheese, dish, or cheese-adjacent scenario needs a definitive position?

---

## Why it's a grey area

Explain why this item is ambiguous and why a ruling would be useful.

---

## Proposed position

What should the agent's position be? Include suggested tier (if a cheese variety) or a rationale (if cheese-adjacent).

---

## Suggested wording

Optional. Draft the ruling as it might appear in `CLAUDE.md`.
